system.description:
This state-of-the-art Agency-branded helicopter offers freedom from all of your terrestrial woes. Featuring premium leather seating for up to 9 passengers, a range of over 300 nautical miles, a cruise speed of 140 knots, a customizable automated assistant, and chilled cupholders, the Skybreaker is truly the supreme way to travel.

Pilot training not included. Liability waiver required.

Add +666 surcharge for Fire Resistant hull coating.
